LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Desc: Consumes one reactor saint sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and stages a breach-skyfall cocoon that slams down near the colony with an impact blast. The cocoon remains sealed for about twenty in-game minutes, releases the Infernal Reactor Saint, then burns back upward roughly ten minutes later.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Rewards: • Second full boss tier after the first vertical slice • Drops a saint reactor core, spacer-grade salvage, and high-value residue • Forces anti-artillery spacing and sustained boss pressure management
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_SideEffect: • Impacts near the colony instead of entering from the map edge • Stays on the field as a sealed reactor cocoon for roughly twenty in-game minutes before release • Launches back upward about ten minutes after releasing the boss
LanguageData.ABY_ReactorSaintSummonSuccessDesc: The reactor sigil has taken. A saint-class biomechanical cocoon has completed its sealed skyfall cycle, ruptured near the colony, and released the Infernal Reactor Saint into local space.
